title: U.S. Allows Russian Oil Tanker to Reach Cuba, Despite Blockade
summary_full: The tanker full of crude oil could reach its expected destination by Monday, providing a lifeline to the island amid intense U.S. pressure.
summary_public: The tanker full of crude oil could reach its expected destination by Monday, providing a lifeline to the island amid intense U.S. pressure.

RU.label: neutral
RU.evidence: U.S. Allows Russian Oil Tanker to Reach Cuba
